UnitedHealthcare Unveils AI Companion to Improve Navigation

By Marissa Plescia on March 27, 2026 5:47 pm

UnitedHealthcare launched a new AI companion named Avery to help members handle common benefits and care-navigation tasks.

The company said the tool can surface coverage details, appointments and claims information before handing off to a live advocate when needed.

How Artera is Using Agentic AI to Humanize Patient Care

Sponsored promo text that should not appear in the body.

Avery also provides a summary of the issue to the support representative so members do not need to repeat themselves after the handoff.
